objective: Plan useful complementary-role work across admitted nodes of one System with bounded placement, coordination, reconciliation, and failure semantics.
falsifiable_claim: Complementary roles can complete across admitted nodes without placement granting authority or failures creating duplicate effects.
exit_criteria: Complementary roles complete across admitted nodes while placement grants no authority.
Worker, coordinator, node, link, and partition faults yield declared continue, pause, reassign, or fail-closed states with no duplicate effect.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M11_USEFUL_SAME_SYSTEM_DISTRIBUTION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Fail workers, coordinators, nodes, links, leases, watermarks, epochs, partitions, reassignment, reconciliation, and final-invoker admission at every boundary.
remaining_nonclaims: Exactly one system_id; no AIIP or independent-party claim.
No physical-live, cross-sovereign, consensus, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
